  • Method Details

    • employer

      public Employment.Builder employer(String employer)
      The business name of an investor's employer.

    • employer

      public Employment.Builder employer(Optional<String> employer)
      The business name of an investor's employer.

    • employerAddress

      public Employment.Builder employerAddress(EmployerAddress employerAddress)
      The data structure containing attributes describing the location of an investor's employer. If input, the required fields within the `employer_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • employerAddress

      public Employment.Builder employerAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EmployerAddress> employerAddress)
      The data structure containing attributes describing the location of an investor's employer. If input, the required fields within the `employer_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • employmentId

      public Employment.Builder employmentId(String employmentId)
      System-generated GUID representing the employment record of a natural person

    • employmentId

      public Employment.Builder employmentId(Optional<String> employmentId)
      System-generated GUID representing the employment record of a natural person

    • employmentStatus

      public Employment.Builder employmentStatus(LegalNaturalPersonEmploymentStatus employmentStatus)
      Classifies in what capacity (or if) the underlying natural person holds a job

    • employmentStatus

      public Employment.Builder employmentStatus(Optional<? extends LegalNaturalPersonEmploymentStatus> employmentStatus)
      Classifies in what capacity (or if) the underlying natural person holds a job

    • occupation

      public Employment.Builder occupation(String occupation)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

    • occupation

      public Employment.Builder occupation(Optional<String> occupation)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

    • startYear

      public Employment.Builder startYear(int startYear)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • startYear

      public Employment.Builder startYear(Optional<Integer> startYear)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `employment_status` is one of: - `EMPLOYED` - `SELF_EMPLOYED`

      Otherwise, must be empty.
